tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Live Like We're Dying
By: Kris Allen

I did not write this song!!

CAPO ON 5
Chords are relative to capo


[tab]Chords Used:
    [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]D/F#[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Em7[/ch]
E|----3-----2----3----3--|
B|----3-----3----3----3--|
G|----0-----2----0----0--|
D|----2-----0----0----2--|
A|----3-----0----2----2--|
E|----x-----2----3----x--|[/tab]

Intro:
[ch]Cadd9[/ch] - [ch]G[/ch] - [ch]Em7[/ch] - [ch]D/F#[/ch]

Verse 1:
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Em7[/ch]           [ch]D/F#[/ch]
sometimes we fall down and can't get back up[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Em7[/ch]         [ch]D/F#[/ch]
we're hiding behind skin that's too tough[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Em7[/ch]      [ch]D/F#[/ch]
how come we don't say I love you enough[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch]            [ch]D/F#[/ch]   
Till it's too late,   it's not too late[/tab]

Verse 2:
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Em7[/ch]       [ch]D/F#[/ch]
Our hearts are hungry for a food that won't come[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Em7[/ch]              [ch]D/F#[/ch]
we could make a feast from these crumbs[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Em7[/ch]    [ch]D/F#[/ch]
and we're all staring down the barrel of a gun[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
so if your life flashed before you[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Em7[/ch]               [ch]D/F#[/ch]
what would you wish you would've done[/tab]
Yeah... gotta start

Chorus: (tambourine)
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
lookin at the hand of the time we've been given here[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]
this is all we got and we gotta start pickin it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
every second counts on a clock that's tickin'[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                   [ch]D/F#[/ch]
gotta live like we're dying[/tab]
We only got
[tab]Caad9  [ch]G[/ch]
86 400 seconds in a day to[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                   [ch]D/F#[/ch]
turn it all around or throw it all away[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]
we gotta tell 'em that we love 'em[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]
while we got the chance to say[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em7[/ch]                [ch]D/F#[/ch]
gotta live like we're dying[/tab]

Verse 3:
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Em7[/ch]    [ch]D/F#[/ch]  
And if your plane   fell out of the skies[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Em7[/ch]       [ch]D/F#[/ch]

[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Em7[/ch]          [ch]D/F#[/ch]  
should be so careful who we live out our   lives[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
so when we long for absolution[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                    [ch]D/F#[/ch]
there'll no one on the line[/tab]
